meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn to use AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to crush technical debt and ship your MVP faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project abandonment is often 'debugging fatigue'—getting stuck in a loop of errors that drain your momentum. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid CLI-based resolution, you transform your development environment into an autonomous partner, allowing you to ship features faster than your competitors.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with a vision, code for three weeks, and then hit a wall of cryptic stack traces and dependency hell. That friction point is exactly where your momentum dies and your competitors win. The difference between a founder who ships and a founder who dreams is not raw coding talent; it is the ability to leverage intelligent systems to clear technical blockers in seconds, not days.

We are moving past the era of manual debugging. By treating your codebase as a living entity managed by agents like Claude Code, you shift from being a 'fixer' to a 'product architect'. This tutorial is your blueprint for reclaiming your roadmap, overcoming the inertia of bugs, and building a high-velocity development loop that keeps you in the market, not the terminal.

steps.title: Contextualize Your Technical Debt
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify the structural bottlenecks causing the most friction in your sprint.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory. Identify the three most complex modules contributing to recent build failures and suggest a refactoring strategy to simplify the logic.

steps.title: Automated Error Triage
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into the AI to extract actionable root cause analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Parse the following error log. Identify the specific line of code causing the crash and explain if this is a dependency issue or a logic error.

steps.title: Agentic Code Injection
steps.description: Allow the agent to propose and test a fix in a safe environment before applying changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch for the identified bug in the user authentication module. Ensure the fix preserves existing unit tests.

steps.title: Regression Testing at Scale
steps.description: Ensure your fixes didn't break secondary features by running automated verification.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and identify any regressions introduced by the recent patch. If tests fail, suggest the necessary adjustments.

steps.title: Final Deployment Validation
steps.description: Verify the build is production-ready and perform a final security sanity check.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a final security audit of the modified files. Check for hardcoded credentials or insecure API practices.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'thought file' in your repo to keep the AI aligned with your long-term product vision during complex debug sessions.
Use Claude Code's --chat mode to iterate on feature logic before committing to a specific architectural pattern.
Set up Antigravity hooks to automatically trigger an analysis every time a build fails in your CI/CD pipeline.
Treat your codebase like a high-performance engine: use AI to refactor code for readability, not just functionality, to reduce future bug frequency.
Never accept the first AI-generated patch; always ask the agent to 'explain the trade-offs' of their proposed solution.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin automating your daily stand-ups by having the AI generate a summary of your technical progress directly from your git commit history.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage of a ten-person engineering team. Stop letting bugs dictate your launch date. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
